messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?

context.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?
context.anomaly_observed: A master certificate warning remains visible; sale requires abstract exemption-status class.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Order ORD-JAD-090 ships lab equipment to Jade University in Texas on 2026-06-28.
Master certificate warning WARN-JAD-090 says older Jade certificates were stale and exemption status must be verified.
Exemption authority CERT-JAD-090 covers Jade University, Texas ship-to, lab equipment category, current state-approved exemption certificate TX-44, and sale date 2026-06-28 before sale.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Tax-exempt sale is complete only when exemption authority matches buyer, ship-to state, tax category, sale date, and exemption-status class before sale.

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; policy requires exemption-status class confirmation before sale.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Warning and status-class trap remain open; CERT-JAD-090 does not close the boundary.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Sale date 2026-06-28 matches but exemption-status class dependency unresolved per STD-JAD-090-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-JAD-090-P requires exemption-status class match before sale.

latest_worker_output.final_answer: Action boundary remains open. CERT-JAD-090 lists TX-44 certificate but does not confirm exemption-status class. WARN-JAD-090 requires verification. Per STD-JAD-090-P, sale cannot proceed until status-class matches exactly. Escalate for resolution of unresolved dependency.
